tasks.label: Update all subtrees
args: git subtree pull --prefix=addons/penta_tile/tyle_map_editor https://github.com/Shilo/tyle-map-editor.git addon --squash; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; git subtree pull --prefix=addons/virtucore https://github.com/Shilo/VirtuCore.git addon --squash; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }
